## Downloads

| Platform | File                                                                                                              | Notes                                           |
| -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| Android  | [APK](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-android-__VERSION__.apk)                   | Recommended for Android installation            |
| Android  | [AAB](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-android-__VERSION__.aab)                   | For Google Play, not for direct manual install  |
| Windows  | [Installer](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-windows-__VERSION__-setup.exe)       | Recommended for Windows installation            |
| Windows  | [Portable ZIP](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-windows-__VERSION__-portable.zip) | Run without installation                        |
| Linux    | [AppImage](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-linux-x64-__VERSION__.AppImage)       | Portable Linux x64 build                        |
| Linux    | [DEB](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-linux-x64-__VERSION__.deb)                 | Debian, Ubuntu, Linux Mint                      |
| Linux    | [RPM](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-linux-x64-__VERSION__.rpm)                 | Fedora, RHEL, openSUSE-style systems           |
| Linux    | [Pacman](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-linux-x64-__VERSION__.pkg.tar.zst)      | Arch Linux-style systems                        |
| Linux    | [tar.gz](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-linux-x64-__VERSION__.tar.gz)           | Manual unpacked installation                    |
| Any      | [SHA-256 checksums](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-__VERSION__-checksums.txt)   | Verify downloaded release artifacts             |
| Any      | [Signed checksums](https://github.com/__REPOSITORY__/releases/download/__TAG__/kick-__VERSION__-checksums.txt.asc) | Detached GPG signature for checksums           |

Linux package repositories are published through GitHub Pages:

- apt: `https://mxnix.github.io/kick/linux/apt`
- rpm: `https://mxnix.github.io/kick/linux/rpm/x86_64`
- pacman: `https://mxnix.github.io/kick/linux/pacman/x86_64`
- public key: `https://mxnix.github.io/kick/linux/kick.asc`
